_comment: Probes for the weekly live-probe drift job (scripts/live_probe.py). Each probe hits ONE real Zürich endpoint and is compared STRUCTURALLY against its recorded fixture under promptfoo/fixtures/. URLs are representative of the Zürich CKAN/WFS surface — confirm them against the target server's actual endpoint config (zurich-opendata-mcp) before relying on them. Keep this list to read-only GET/SELECT queries only.
